top.contains: solid blue bar with a thin, dark top edge.

bottom.contains: solid blue bar with a thin, dark bottom edge.

left.contains: thin solid blue vertical bar, with a dark blue vertical line on the left side and a magenta vertical line on the right side.

right.contains: solid blue container with a yellow text bar and branding. The text bar at the bottom contains 'CONTAINER IS 25% OF WIDTH OF THE POSTER'. Above it is the vertical 'prime' logo and swoosh. The text at the top, inside a magenta box, reads 'LOGO IS 60% OF DEPTH OF THE CONTAINER'.

frameAnalysis.corners: Large complex branding container on the entire right side.
frameAnalysis.instructions: Place the main hero subject for the 2362x669 artwork centrally or slightly to the left to ensure it is not obscured by the extensive right-side frame. Any main title text should be located in the top-left or top-center of the art zone, avoiding the blue frame completely. The composition must strictly avoid placing any crucial content or text in the right-most 802 pixels of the overall canvas, which is entirely occupied by the frame.

frameInstructions: Place the main hero subject for the 2362x669 artwork centrally or slightly to the left to ensure it is not obscured by the extensive right-side frame.
